title: Christmas Snowflake Cookie Cutter 3D Printed PLA | Holiday Baking Tool Size M 7-8cm | Winter Festive Kitchen Accessory
description:
Bring the magic of a winter wonderland to your holiday baking with our beautifully designed Christmas Snowflake Cookie Cutter. This stunning snowflake shape captures the intricate beauty of nature's most delicate frozen crystals, making it the perfect tool for creating show-stopping cookies that will impress family and friends at every holiday gathering. Whether you are preparing treats for Christmas Eve, a winter party, or simply enjoying a cozy afternoon of baking, this cookie cutter will help you craft picture-perfect snowflake cookies every single time.

**Features & Design**
Our Christmas Snowflake Cookie Cutter features a detailed snowflake silhouette with crisp, clean cutting edges that produce beautifully defined shapes in your cookie dough. The design strikes the ideal balance between intricate detail and practicality, ensuring your cookies release cleanly from the cutter while still showcasing a gorgeous snowflake pattern. The cutter is lightweight yet sturdy, comfortable to press into dough, and built to last through many holiday baking seasons. The ergonomic top edge allows for even pressure distribution, so you get consistent results with every cut.

**Dimensions**
This listing is for our Size M cookie cutter, which measures approximately 7-8cm (2.8-3.1 inches) across at its widest point. The cutting depth is approximately 1.5cm, which is ideal for standard rolled cookie dough. This medium size is perfect for creating cookies that are substantial enough to decorate with royal icing, fondant, or sprinkles, while still fitting nicely on a standard baking sheet.

**How to Use**
For best results, roll your cookie dough to an even thickness of about 5-8mm on a lightly floured surface. Press the cookie cutter firmly and evenly into the dough, then gently lift it away. If the dough sticks, try dipping the cutter lightly in flour or chilling your dough for 10-15 minutes before cutting. For the cleanest shapes, cut cookies close together to minimize waste, and re-roll scraps only once or twice to maintain dough quality. Bake your cookies according to your favorite recipe and let them cool completely before decorating.

**Care Instructions**
Printed in food-safe PLA. Hand wash only – not dishwasher safe. Do not use in microwave or oven. To clean, simply rinse under lukewarm water and gently remove any dough residue with a soft brush or cloth. Allow the cutter to air dry completely before storing. Avoid exposure to high heat, boiling water, or prolonged direct sunlight, as PLA can warp at elevated temperatures. With proper care, your cookie cutter will remain in excellent condition for years of holiday baking enjoyment.

**Perfect Gift Ideas**
This Christmas Snowflake Cookie Cutter makes a thoughtful and charming gift for bakers of all skill levels. It is an ideal stocking stuffer, Secret Santa present, or addition to a holiday baking gift basket paired with sprinkles, icing bags, and a favorite cookie recipe. Teachers, coworkers, neighbors, and friends who love to bake will absolutely adore receiving this festive little tool. It also makes a wonderful party favor for holiday cookie decorating events or a sweet addition to a housewarming gift during the winter season. Pair it with a few of our other holiday-themed cutters to create a complete Christmas baking set that any baker would treasure.

**About Our Shop**
Every cookie cutter in our shop is handmade and 3D printed to order, meaning each piece is crafted with care and attention to detail specifically for you. We produce our cutters in small batches using high-quality, food-safe PLA filament to ensure consistency and durability. Because each item is printed on demand, we are able to minimize waste and offer unique designs that you will not find in mass-produced kitchenware. Thank you for supporting our small creative business, and we hope our tools bring joy and inspiration to your baking adventures!
